MateCard.new

MateCard constructor

const MateCard({
  1. Key? key,
  2. required String title,
  3. required String description,
  4. String? profileImageAsset,
  5. Widget? profileImage,
  6. VoidCallback? onTap,
  7. double? height,
  8. double? borderRadius,
  9. double? profileImageSize,
  10. double? profileImageRadius,
  11. EdgeInsetsGeometry? padding,
  12. Color? backgroundColor,
  13. Color? borderColor,
  14. double? borderWidth,
  15. TextStyle? titleStyle,
  16. TextStyle? descriptionStyle,
  17. double? textSpacing,
  18. BoxFit imageFit = BoxFit.cover,
  19. Color? imagePlaceholderColor,
})

Implementation

const MateCard({
  super.key,
  required this.title,
  required this.description,
  this.profileImageAsset,
  this.profileImage,
  this.onTap,
  this.height,
  this.borderRadius,
  this.profileImageSize,
  this.profileImageRadius,
  this.padding,
  this.backgroundColor,
  this.borderColor,
  this.borderWidth,
  this.titleStyle,
  this.descriptionStyle,
  this.textSpacing,
  this.imageFit = BoxFit.cover,
  this.imagePlaceholderColor,
});
